canonical_definition: A defense procedure that rejects prompts whose perplexity exceeds a threshold, used to test whether adversarial suffixes remain readable.
papers: ProAdvPrompter: A Two-Stage Journey to Effective Adversarial Prompting for LLMs
Understanding and Enhancing the Transferability of Jailbreaking Attacks
